compiled_state.title: Implement p95 benchmark harness for 5 validator entry points and 4 consumer reads
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Depends on T7 (05d2-2c7d). Implement `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh` to make `test_benchmark_measures_p95_per_stage` pass.

## Implementation Notes
Create `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh`:

Supports flags: --iterations=N (default 20), --dry-run (skip real validator invocation), --output=<file> (write results JSON)

Measures p95 latency for:
- 5 validator entry points: preplanning, implementation-plan, sprint, commit, epic-closure
- 4 consumer reads: harvest-worktree, completion-verifier, merge-to-main-archive, ticket-list-show

In --dry-run mode: simulate with `sleep 0.001` to avoid requiring full stack.
In real mode: invoke each validator with a minimal synthetic PRECONDITIONS event.

p95 calculation: collect N timing samples per stage, sort, take index at ceil(0.95*N).
Use macOS-compatible millisecond timing (same pattern as benchmark-tool-logging.sh).

Output format (one line per stage, plus summary JSON):
```
STAGE_P95_MS: preplanning 42
STAGE_P95_MS: implementation-plan 38
STAGE_P95_MS: sprint 45
STAGE_P95_MS: commit 31
STAGE_P95_MS: epic-closure 52
CONSUMER_P95_MS: harvest-worktree 18
CONSUMER_P95_MS: completion-verifier 22
CONSUMER_P95_MS: merge-to-main-archive 15
CONSUMER_P95_MS: ticket-list-show 9
BENCHMARK_COMPLETE: {"run_at": "TIMESTAMP", "iterations": N, "stages": {...}, "consumers": {...}}
```

When --output=<file> is specified, write the BENCHMARK_COMPLETE JSON to that file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh
- [ ] Benchmark runs and emits all 9 P95 measurements
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh --iterations=3 --dry-run | grep -c 'STAGE_P95_MS:\|CONSUMER_P95_MS:' | python3 -c "import sys; assert int(sys.stdin.read().strip()) == 9"
- [ ] BENCHMARK_COMPLETE emitted
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh --iterations=3 --dry-run | grep -q 'BENCHMARK_COMPLETE:'
- [ ] test_benchmark_measures_p95_per_stage passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/perf/test-preconditions-benchmark.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

comments.body: AC amendment: T8 (p95 benchmark harness) must write BENCHMARK_COMPLETE JSON to a discoverable output file for Story 7 documentation pickup. Acceptance criteria addition: --output=plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-benchmark-results.json when run in doc-generation mode. Story 7 (ad8f-3a8a) reads this file to include p95 data in the schema contract doc. Add: 'Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh --iterations=10 --dry-run --output=/tmp/bench-test.json && test -f /tmp/bench-test.json && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open("/tmp/bench-test.json")); assert "stages" in d and "consumers" in d"'
comments.author: Test
